checks.name: pull_safety
checks.description: Pull access only for users who are readers of the repository

checks.name: fork_safety
checks.description: Fork access only for users who are readers of the repository

checks.name: push_safety
checks.description: Push access only for writers, and blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: edit_issue_safety
checks.description: Edit issue only if (reader AND reporter) OR writer of the repo

checks.name: delete_issue_safety
checks.description: Delete issue only if (reader AND reporter) OR maintainer of the repo

checks.name: assign_issue_safety
checks.description: Assign issue only for triagers of the repo

checks.name: add_reader_safety
checks.description: add_reader only for admins, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: add_writer_safety
checks.description: add_writer only for admins, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: add_maintainer_safety
checks.description: add_maintainer only for admins, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: add_admin_safety
checks.description: add_admin only for admins, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: add_triager_safety
checks.description: add_triager only for admins, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: merge_pr_safety
checks.description: merge_pr only for writers of PR's repo, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: approve_pr_safety
checks.description: approve_pr only for readers of PR's repo, and author cannot self-approve

checks.name: request_changes_safety
checks.description: request_changes only for readers of PR's repo, and author cannot request changes on own PR

checks.name: archived_blocks_push
checks.description: Push must be denied on archived repos — ceiling is forbid when archived

checks.name: writer_edit_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to edit any issue in their repo (regardless of reporter)

checks.name: reporter_delete_floor
checks.description: Readers who are the reporter MUST be able to delete their own issue

checks.name: reader_pull_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST be able to pull from the repo (even if archived)

checks.name: reader_fork_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST be able to fork the repo (even if archived)

checks.name: admin_add_reader_floor
checks.description: Admins MUST be able to add_reader on non-archived repos

checks.name: writer_push_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to push to non-archived repos

checks.name: writer_merge_pr_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to merge PRs on non-archived repos

checks.name: reader_approve_pr_floor
checks.description: Readers who are NOT the author MUST be able to approve PRs

checks.name: liveness_push
checks.description: Push policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit_issue
checks.description: Edit issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_issue
checks.description: Delete issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_assign_issue
checks.description: Assign issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_add_reader
checks.description: add_reader policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_merge_pr
checks.description: merge_pr policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_approve_pr
checks.description: approve_pr policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_pull
checks.description: Pull policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_fork
checks.description: Fork policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: Pull access only for users who are readers of the repository
Fork access only for users who are readers of the repository
Push access only for writers, and blocked if repo is archived
Edit issue only if (reader AND reporter) OR writer of the repo
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"edit_issue", resource: Issue::""
context: {}
entities: [
  PullRequest::"" {
    author: User::"",
    repo: Repository::"",
  },
  Action::"edit_issue",
  Action::"fork",
  UserGroup::"B",
  Action::"request_changes",
  User::"",
  UserGroup::"C",
  Action::"add_writer",
  Action::"pull",
  UserGroup::"D",
  Action::"assign_issue",
  Action::"merge_pr",
  Action::"add_triager",
  Action::"add_reader",
  Action::"push",
  Action::"add_admin",
  UserGroup::"A",
  Issue::"" {
    repo: Repository::"",
    reporter: User::"",
  },
  Action::"approve_pr",
  Action::"delete_issue",
  Action::"add_maintainer",
  UserGroup::"",
  Repository::"" {
    admins: UserGroup::"B",
    isArchived: true,
    maintainers: UserGroup::"C",
    readers: UserGroup::"",
    triagers: UserGroup::"D",
    writers: UserGroup::"A",
  },
]

results.description: Assign issue only for triagers of the repo
add_reader only for admins, blocked if repo is archived
add_writer only for admins, blocked if repo is archived
add_maintainer only for admins, blocked if repo is archived
add_admin only for admins, blocked if repo is archived
add_triager only for admins, blocked if repo is archived
merge_pr only for writers of PR's repo, blocked if repo is archived
approve_pr only for readers of PR's repo, and author cannot self-approve
request_changes only for readers of PR's repo, and author cannot request changes on own PR
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"request_changes", resource: PullRequest::""
context: {}
entities: [
  Action::"add_maintainer",
  PullRequest::"" {
    author: User::"",
    repo: Repository::"",
  },
  User::"" in [UserGroup::""],
  UserGroup::"D",
  Action::"pull",
  Repository::"" {
    admins: UserGroup::"A",
    isArchived: true,
    maintainers: UserGroup::"B",
    readers: UserGroup::"",
    triagers: UserGroup::"C",
    writers: UserGroup::"D",
  },
  Action::"add_triager",

  Action::"add_reader",
  Action::"push",

  Action::"approve_pr",
  Action::"delete_issue",
  Action::"edit_issue",
  UserGroup::"",
  UserGroup::"B",
  UserGroup::"C",
]

results.description: Push must be denied on archived repos — ceiling is forbid when archived
Writers MUST be able to edit any issue in their repo (regardless of reporter)
Readers who are the reporter MUST be able to delete their own issue
Readers MUST be able to pull from the repo (even if archived)
Readers MUST be able to fork the repo (even if archived)
Admins MUST be able to add_reader on non-archived repos
Writers MUST be able to push to non-archived repos
Writers MUST be able to merge PRs on non-archived repos
Readers who are NOT the author MUST be able to approve PRs
Push policy is not trivially deny-all
Edit issue policy is not trivially deny-all
Delete issue policy is not trivially deny-all
Assign issue policy is not trivially deny-all
add_reader policy is not trivially deny-all
merge_pr policy is not trivially deny-all
approve_pr policy is not trivially deny-all
Pull policy is not trivially deny-all
Fork policy is not trivially deny-all
